wind_info.description: Strong headwind with a slight crosswind from the left.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Player, this is a strong headwind. Use an overstable disc and focus on a clean hyzer release to combat the wind and keep it straight.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: An overstable disc will also work well here, providing control against the strong headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Use an overstable disc with a hyzer release to fight this strong headwind and achieve a controlled flight.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: An overstable disc is recommended for control against the challenging headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Another strong headwind hole. Select an overstable disc and execute a powerful hyzer shot.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: An overstable disc offers the best control in this significant headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Use an overstable disc, focus on a hyzer release to battle the strong headwind.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: An overstable disc is your best bet for stability and control against this wind.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Player, this is a tough crosswind from your left. It will push the disc right, exposing the underside. Prefer a forehand.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: With this strong left-to-right crosswind, a controlled forehand with an overstable disc is the most reliable play here. Aim slightly left of the target.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Your natural fade goes right, and the wind is pushing right – a double challenge. A forehand is strongly recommended.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: This is the preferred shot. Use an overstable disc and aim to the left of the target to allow the wind to carry it back towards the pin.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: This right-to-left crosswind will push your disc left. A controlled hyzer with an overstable disc should manage it well.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: A forehand with an overstable disc is also a solid option here, allowing you to fight the crosswind.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Champ, your natural fade goes right, and the wind is pushing left – they work together. This should be a comfortable shot for you.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: A forehand with an overstable disc is also viable here, offering good control.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Similar to the yellow tee, this strong right-to-left crosswind requires a controlled hyzer with an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: A forehand with an overstable disc is a good alternative for battling this crosswind.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: This is a comfortable angle for your natural fade, with the wind pushing left to help. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: A forehand with an overstable disc can also be effective here.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Player, brace yourself for a strong headwind. An overstable disc, released with power, is essential to fight it.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: An overstable disc will also perform well on a forehand line, offering stability against the direct headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Utilize an overstable disc. This headwind demands a powerful, clean throw to prevent it from stalling out.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: An overstable disc is recommended for maximum control and distance in this significant headwind.

wind_info.description: Strong headwind with a slight crosswind from the right.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: This is primarily a headwind with a touch of right crosswind. Use an overstable disc and a hyzer release to keep it on line.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: This hole is favorable for your natural fade, with the wind helping. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: A forehand with an overstable disc can be used for predictable flight.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Player, this is a strong tailwind. Use an understable disc to take advantage of the extra distance and glide.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: With this strong tailwind, an understable disc is ideal for maximizing distance. Aim for a smooth release.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: An understable disc will be greatly helped by this tailwind, allowing for a long flight.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: An understable disc on a forehand will also excel with this tailwind assistance.
